verdict: The chart is technically on-beat but incredibly lazy, relying on a mindless, repeating three-lane cycle (BAR -> NOTE -> GAP) that completely ignores the music's structure and melody.

issues.problem: Mindless, repeating lane-cycling pattern (BAR -> NOTE -> GAP) is used throughout the entire track, ignoring melodic contour, chord changes, and percussion placement.
Chart density is completely flat with identical quarter-note pacing, failing to differentiate the intro build-up from the actual drop.
Awkward 1.0-beat holds on BAR and GAP lanes overlap with quick eighth-note taps in other lanes, creating a clunky physical flow that doesn't match the synth lead.
